caption: A computer screen displays a dark-themed terminal interface with multiple windows. The top portion of the screen shows a terminal window running commands, featuring a mix of white, green, and red text on a black background. Legible text includes "msg'* tail routiner starter_ path/var/log/app" and "k8s kubectl create -f fluent-bit-configmap.yaml". As the sequence progresses, a new window opens in the foreground, displaying a directory structure and file content. This window contains technical configuration details under the header "fluent-bit-configmap.yaml", including sections like "INPUT", "FILTER", and "OUTPUT", with specific parameters such as "Name fluentbit_logs" and "Match *". The cursor moves across the screen, and the layout of the windows shifts as the user interacts with the system, transitioning from a view of running logs to the inspection of a configuration file.
